case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: *NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ORDERED DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND OFF CALENDAR UNTIMELY/IMPROPER SERVICE 1)SERVED ON 08/13 BY PERSONAL SERVICE (20 DAYS) 2)CITY ATTORNEY NOT SERVED.
